positive: A majestic, stylized geometric mountain range silhouette at twilight. The mountains should be depicted with clean, interlocking geometric lines and sharp edges, giving a sense of deep dimension and permanence. Below the mountains, include a minimalist stylized grove of abstract pine trees and flowing abstract river lines. Use a limited, vibrant color palette: deep indigo blues, cosmic purples, vibrant teal accents, and burnt orange/gold for the sky gradient. The style should be a blend of Art Deco geometry, modern minimalist line art, and celestial gradients. Central composition, suitable for large print on apparel, extremely clean vector look, high contrast between the dark silhouettes and the glowing sky.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, noise, low quality, cartoon, graffiti, messy, poor anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, signature
